allow:
Bash(powershell -Command "
\\$url = 'https://push-api.selectinfo-yaowao.workers.dev/api/send'
\\$headers = @{'Content-Type'='application/json'}

\\$body1 = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes\('{\\"token\\": \\"r0701yhs-3ugh-85oh-9iexfyf2gd1t\\", \\"title\\": \\"連続テストA\\", \\"message\\": \\"1件目 - りんご\\", \\"priority\\": \\"normal\\"}'\)
\\$body2 = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes\('{\\"token\\": \\"r0701yhs-3ugh-85oh-9iexfyf2gd1t\\", \\"title\\": \\"連続テストB\\", \\"message\\": \\"2件目 - みかん\\", \\"priority\\": \\"high\\"}'\)
\\$body3 = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes\('{\\"token\\": \\"r0701yhs-3ugh-85oh-9iexfyf2gd1t\\", \\"title\\": \\"連続テストC\\", \\"message\\": \\"3件目 - ぶどう\\", \\"priority\\": \\"urgent\\"}'\)

\\$r1 = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri \\$url -Method POST -Headers \\$headers -Body \\$body1
\\$r2 = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri \\$url -Method POST -Headers \\$headers -Body \\$body2
\\$r3 = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri \\$url -Method POST -Headers \\$headers -Body \\$body3

Write-Output \('A: ' + \\$r1.success\)
Write-Output \('B: ' + \\$r2.success\)
Write-Output \('C: ' + \\$r3.success\)
")
